title: Review Finding
description: A single finding from a review agent in the Street Soccer review pipeline.

agent.description: The review agent that produced this finding.

finding_id.description: Unique finding ID within this review. Format: agent prefix + 3-digit number (e.g., DG-001, MA-001).

severity.description: Severity level. P0: crash/data-loss/blocks-other-WPs. P1: incorrect player-visible behavior. P2: performance/code-smell/minor-UX. P3: polish/documentation/style.

category.description: The concern category (e.g., resource-management, ecs-patterns, rendering, constants, merge-conflict, spec-divergence).

file.description: Relative path to the file containing the issue.

line_range.description: Line number or [start, end] range in the file. Single-element array for a single line.

rule.description: The specific rule or checklist item being evaluated. Must be a direct quote or precise reference from the governing document.

description.description: What the issue is. Concise, factual, actionable.

evidence.description: Quoted code snippet from the diff or file that triggered this finding. If you cannot quote the code, do not report the finding.

suggested_fix.description: How to resolve the issue. Optional but recommended.

blocks_merge.description: Whether this finding should block the merge. P0 and P1 always block. P2 and P3 never block.
